widgets.title: Avg Fare Usd by Carrier Name
widgets.description: Average fare in USD grouped by each carrier name
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "carrier_name" AS label, AVG("avg_fare_usd") AS value FROM "t_airline_flights" GROUP BY "carrier_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Total Avg Fare Usd
widgets.description: Average fare in USD across all flights
widgets.dataKey: SELECT 'Average Fare USD' AS label, CAST(AVG("avg_fare_usd") AS DOUBLE) AS value, 0.0 AS delta, 'positive' AS sentiment, 'overall' AS delta_basis FROM "t_airline_flights" LIMIT 1

widgets.title: Distance Mi by Carrier Name Over Flight Date
widgets.description: Monthly total distance flown in miles grouped by carrier name over flight dates.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "flight_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, "carrier_name" AS series, CAST(SUM("distance_mi") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_airline_flights" GROUP BY x, series ORDER BY x ASC, series ASC

widgets.title: Distance Mi Frequency Distribution
widgets.description: Histogram showing the frequency distribution of flight distances in miles.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(FLOOR("distance_mi" / 100) * 100 AS VARCHAR) || '-' || CAST(FLOOR("distance_mi" / 100) * 100 + 99 AS VARCHAR) AS bucket, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS count FROM "t_airline_flights" WHERE "distance_mi" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY CAST(SPLIT_PART(bucket, '-', 1) AS INTEGER) ASC

widgets.title: Avg Fare Usd Over Flight Date
widgets.description: Average fare in USD aggregated by month over the flight dates.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "flight_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, AVG("avg_fare_usd") AS value FROM "t_airline_flights" GROUP BY x ORDER BY x ASC

widgets.title: Avg Fare Usd Distribution by Aircraft Type
widgets.description: Shows the average fare in USD grouped by aircraft type for all flights.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "aircraft_type" AS label, AVG("avg_fare_usd") AS value FROM "t_airline_flights" GROUP BY "aircraft_type" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Carrier Name × Aircraft Type Heatmap
widgets.description: Heatmap showing the count of flights by carrier name and aircraft type.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "carrier_name" AS row, "aircraft_type" AS col, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_airline_flights" GROUP BY "carrier_name", "aircraft_type" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: Avg Fare Usd vs Distance Mi Correlation
widgets.description: Scatter plot showing the correlation between average fare in USD and flight distance in miles.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST("distance_mi" AS DOUBLE) AS x, CAST(AVG("avg_fare_usd") AS DOUBLE) AS y FROM "t_airline_flights" WHERE "distance_mi" IS NOT NULL AND "avg_fare_usd" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "distance_mi" ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 1000

widgets.title: Carrier Name Composition by Aircraft Type
widgets.description: Stacked bar chart showing the count of flights per carrier name grouped by aircraft type.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "carrier_name" AS label, "aircraft_type" AS "group", CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_airline_flights" GROUP BY label, "group" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Distance Mi Volume Over Flight Date
widgets.description: Total distance in miles flown aggregated by month over flight dates.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "flight_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, CAST(SUM("distance_mi") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_airline_flights" GROUP BY date_trunc('month', "flight_date") ORDER BY x ASC

widgets.title: Carrier Name Ranked by Distance Mi
widgets.description: Total distance flown by each carrier, ranked descending
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "carrier_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("distance_mi") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_airline_flights" GROUP BY "carrier_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Avg Fare Usd vs Distance Mi by Carrier Name
widgets.description: Comparison of average fare in USD and average flight distance in miles for each carrier.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "carrier_name" AS label, AVG("avg_fare_usd") AS value1, AVG(CAST("distance_mi" AS DOUBLE)) AS value2 FROM "t_airline_flights" GROUP BY "carrier_name" ORDER BY (value1 + value2) DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Carrier Name Composition Over Flight Date
widgets.description: Stacked area chart showing the count of flights per carrier over time by month.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "flight_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, "carrier_name" AS series, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_airline_flights" GROUP BY x, series ORDER BY x ASC, series ASC

widgets.title: Scheduled Block Min Proportion by Carrier Name
widgets.description: Proportion of total scheduled block minutes aggregated by carrier name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "carrier_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("scheduled_block_min") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_airline_flights" GROUP BY "carrier_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 30
